metrics_explanation.account_wipeout: Whether an event wiped the whole account; any true value blocks promotion.
metrics_explanation.calmar: Annualized return divided by max drawdown; live safety ratio.
metrics_explanation.fills: Executed fill count; helps detect starved or overactive sleeves.
metrics_explanation.liquidation_count: Number of liquidation events in the split.
metrics_explanation.live_integer_leverage: Whether the row uses a positive integer leverage supported by the live venue/runner.
metrics_explanation.live_integer_source_leverage: For hybrid rows, whether every active source candidate also uses positive integer leverage.
metrics_explanation.max_drawdown: Largest peak-to-trough equity loss in the split; lower is safer.
metrics_explanation.maximum_liquidation_equity_loss_fraction: Worst equity fraction lost at liquidation event.
metrics_explanation.maximum_liquidation_event_drawdown: Worst instantaneous drawdown at liquidation event.
metrics_explanation.memory_max_rss: Maximum resident set size evidence; must stay below 8 GiB.
metrics_explanation.minimum_margin_buffer: Minimum equity minus conservative margin requirement; must stay positive.
metrics_explanation.minimum_margin_ratio: Minimum equity divided by margin requirement; higher is safer.
metrics_explanation.monthlyized_return: Monthlyized return estimate used for train/validation stability context.
metrics_explanation.positive_period_ratio: Fraction of positive periods or proxy win-rate where available.
metrics_explanation.return_mdd: Total return divided by max drawdown; rewards return per drawdown unit.
metrics_explanation.sharpe: Return per total volatility; higher is better.
metrics_explanation.smart_sortino: Sortino adjusted by strategy-specific tail/quality penalties when available.
metrics_explanation.sortino: Return per downside volatility; higher is better for asymmetric downside risk.
metrics_explanation.total_return: Split ending equity return before compounding; higher is better after gates.
metrics_explanation.volatility: Annualized or split-normalized total volatility from source artifact.
